{{Infobox character
| name = Queen Shyrax
| aliases = Shyrax
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran|Veshran]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[telekinesis]], [[t’rshentha]], [[Enhancement]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, [[Perfected infiltration]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, draconic magic}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Queen]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, Highness, [[Commander]], Exiled Queen of Karosha, [[Rebel Queen]], Your Highness, exiled Queen of Karosha}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|rebels}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, Varic's crew}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, The Last Horizon's crew}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Queen]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, [[Commander|commander]], journeyman Technician, Captain, bodyguard}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, [[Aether Technician]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Basyrryx]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Queen Shyrax Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the rightful [[Karoshan]] [[Queen]] of the planet [[Karosha]]. A nine-foot-tall figure with bronze skin and glowing golden hair-cables, she is a formidable leader characterized by her intense pursuit of victory and commanding presence. Her reign began nine years ago following the abdication of her mother, [[Shyrax the Second]], but she was later convicted of treason by the [[Dragon Court]]. This led to her cousin, [[Felrex]], claiming the throne as [[King Regent]]. Shyrax has faced betrayal from [[Felrex]], who used his status as a [[Perfected]] to gather support against her. As a warrior, Shyrax is highly versatile and skilled in various forms of combat. She utilizes a golden [[force-blade]], a [[pistol]], and magic, including large-scale incantations that can manifest as a [[dragon]]. She has proven herself capable in diverse contests, ranging from piloting and commanding to weapons repair and unarmed combat. Her physical strength is immense, evidenced by her ability to lift a large man with one hand. In recent events, Shyrax has taken on multiple leadership roles, serving as the Guardian of [[Shadow Ark]] and the [[Commander]] of the starship [[The Last Horizon]]. While she initially sought to command the ship herself, she eventually agreed to lend her strength to its crew. She operates as a rebel leader, commanding [[Karoshan forces]] and seeking to defeat her enemies, including [[the Perfected]] and [[Felrex]]. Throughout her journey, she remains deeply committed to her people and her responsibilities as a mother and monarch.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Driven by an uncompromising pursuit of victory, [[Queen]] Shyrax engaged in a competition for control over [[The Last Horizon]]. During this struggle, she maintained a composed demeanor, leaning back in her seat with her arms folded. She expressed that she was merely awaiting an invitation before returning to her necessary work. Currently, rumors persist that [[the Queen]] and her rebels are operating within this sector.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Queen Shyrax]] pursues victory no matter what.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Shyrax was competing for control of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15">''The Captain'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Shyrax folded her arms and leaned back in her seat.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Shyrax stated she awaits her invitation and has work to do.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Queen Shyrax]] and her rebels are rumored to be in this sector.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] woman with golden eyes and large yellow hands, the exiled [[Rebel Queen]] Shyrax serves as a journeyman Technician possessing the gift of [[Enhancement]]. While commanding her own battlecruiser and fleet, she acted as a crew member and former bodyguard to the [[Captain]] aboard [[The Last Horizon]]. During her service, she utilized telekinesis to don armor, manifested a golden [[dragon]]'s wing for protection, and projected holographic data of [[Advocate ship]] movements. After taking [[Mell]] and potentially entering an agreement with the [[Zenith]] Starship crew, she returned to her fleet to instruct her children with battle maps. Ultimately, she rallied her forces and the Advocates to stand against [[Starhammer]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a [[Karoshan]] woman and the [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen Shyrax]] is the commander of a personal battlecruiser.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a Highness.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a [[Queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax possesses a personal training room that is a hundred yards long.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a leader who has soldiers under her command.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a member of the crew who has refused transport until she finished giving orders.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax uses telekinesis to strap her armor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax opened the back of the prison cell wall.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax can manifest a golden [[dragon]]'s wing from her back for protection.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax was aboard the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax projected the [[Advocate]] ships' actions into a hologram.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax's command can echo in the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a member of the crew.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax's hair-strands emanate golden light.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen Shyrax]] is a journeyman Technician.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen]] [[Shyrax's Technician gift]] is called t’rshentha or [[Enhancement]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen Shyrax]] has not yet completed her masterwork.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen Shyrax]] intends to sharpen the [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a source for empowering weapons in the envisioned fleet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax feels older than the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax possesses a fleet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a [[Karoshan]] with large yellow hands.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a member of the crew and was previously the [[Captain]]'s bodyguard.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax believes the [[Alliance]] will harvest them for genetics to make new [[Perfected]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen Shyrax]] took [[Mell]] and may have entered an agreement with the crew of the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax inspects a holographic map of the system.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is a teammate of the narrator.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax responds to the [[Captain]]'s command.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax has golden eyes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is addressed as Your Highness and [[Commander]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax has people to defend who mostly travel with them.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax returned to her fleet and was instructing her children with battle-maps.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is the exiled [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is nine feet tall.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax is the [[Rebel Queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax uses a wand that glows gold at the tip.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax rallied her forces and the Advocates against [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Queen Shyrax the Third]] is a [[Captain]] and [[Commander]] who possesses dull bronze skin and gold hair-cables. Clad in ornate black and gold battle armor featuring [[dragon]] designs and hidden shield generators, she carries a wand and a golden [[force-blade]] to wield magic of enhancement and amplification. During combat, she has cut through Karoshans on a bridge and fought against green-skinned [[Perfected]] using blue [[Combat Art]]. Serving as an [[Aether Technician]] on [[Varic]]'s crew and a member of [[The Last Horizon]], she utilizes [[Perfected infiltration]] to monitor targets and focuses enhancement systems on engines. As a tactical authority figure, she provides the crew with scans, shield reports, and information regarding the energy capacity of [[Divine Titans]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator needs to check on Shyrax.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is a [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is [[Queen Shyrax the Third]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax has skin of dull bronze and gold hair-cables.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax wears armor plating with elaborate [[dragon]] designs and disguised shield generators.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax carries a [[force-blade]] and a wand.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is willing to live with the consequences of using magic in a specific way.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is the crew's [[Commander]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax believes the [[Zenith Cannon]]'s technology will be invaluable for reclaiming [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan]] agent is compared in age to Shyrax's son.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sola]]'s intensity reminded the narrator of Shyrax.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] have ships given to Shyrax in a chokehold.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax's ships are dark and rectangular in shape.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax wears ornate battle armor that is black worked in gold.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax cut through the Karoshans on the bridge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax told her former soldiers to stand.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is an [[Aether Technician]] on [[Varic]]'s crew.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax intends to monitor [[Benri Vallenar]]'s behavior.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is a character who can glance back over others.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax uses [[Perfected infiltration]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is someone [[Varic]] orders to be contacted.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax focused the enhancement systems on the engines.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax has rebels.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32">''The Knight'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is someone [[Horizon]] needs to get.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax materialized onto the bridge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax wields a golden [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax was fighting a [[Perfected Karoshan]] with green skin and blue [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax uses a wand and magic of enhancement and amplification.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is a character who can be freed to help wake others.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax woke [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is part of a group that can draw up battle plans.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is a person the [[Captain]] intends to put in charge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is a crew member of [[The Last Horizon]] who entered the call.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax notes the energy capacity restrictions of the [[Divine Titans]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax is a leader or authority figure on the bridge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax provides scans and tactical information to the crew.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax reports on the ship's shields.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax was seen looking into the distance on monitors.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|As a [[Karoshan]] ruler of the planet [[Basyrryx]], [[Queen]] Shyrax serves as the [[Commander]] of [[The Last Horizon]] and the Guardian of [[Shadow Ark]]. After being betrayed by [[Felrex]] a few years into her reign, she hid her children across the galaxy to protect them from him. Utilizing a variant of draconic magic and an optical implant capable of projecting footage, she manages fleet support systems and monitors sensor data while directing combat via a communicator. During intense battles, the commander—distinguished by her cable braids and a massive bronze fist covered in golden energy—has personally engaged enemies using a wand as thick as a human arm. Following a period of observing the battlefield and exulting in victory, she was eventually seen floating in a debris field amidst pearls of blood before being taken to Medical.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax can lend [[Technicians]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax rules over the planet [[Basyrryx]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is the [[Commander]] of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax's children are hidden across the galaxy from [[Felrex]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax's spells come from a variant of draconic magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator was once Shyrax’s bodyguard.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax studies monitors and checks sensor data.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax asks what can be done with the core components of an [[Iron Hive]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax requested the deployment of ships.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax's fist is covered by golden energy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax can activate a fleet support system.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is a member of [[The Last Horizon]]'s crew who nearly tore the bridge apart.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is the Guardian of [[Shadow Ark]] and the [[Commander]] of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has a twin brother named [[Veshran]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is a member of the crew who can project footage from her optical implant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has fought against [[Felrex]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has a gigantic chair.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax's children could be in danger if the ship were destroyed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is observing the battlefield.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax exulted in her heart after defeating the enemy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is giving orders during the combat.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax grants permission to engage personally.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has a wand as thick as a human arm.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax directs the fleet using a communicator and console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax's jaw tightened during the discussion.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax believes [[Omega]] does not deserve to be executed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax claims to be a hunter without peer.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is a [[Commander]] with a massive bronze fist and cable braids.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Commander]] Shyrax has a braid of thick cables that glow yellow.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax was betrayed by [[Felrex]] a few years after her reign began.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax is the sister of [[Veshran]] and a [[Karoshan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has a ship with a hull breach.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax was seen floating in a debris field with pearls of blood.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax would die first if the [[Galactic Union]] targeted the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax was in Medical.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“It was my understanding that we were competing for control of The Last Horizon,” she said.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Then I await my invitation. Until then, I have work to do.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Queen Shyrax the Third of the planet Karosha,” Horizon recited.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Shyrax has denied transport until she’s finished giving orders, and we are not in teleportation range.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Do we interrupt other tasks to pursue a Zenith Device?” Shyrax asked.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
